---
applyTo: '**/*.md,**/*.mdx,**/*.txt,**/*.json,**/*.yaml,**/*.yml,**/*.html,**/*.vue,**/*.tsx,**/*.ts,**/*.jsx,**/*.js'
---

For tasks that create or edit Persian prose, use `editorial/fa/ENTRYPOINT.md` as the source of truth.

Keep the core project-agnostic and time-independent. Load current facts only from the target files and nearest scoped context. Preserve protected literals and do not strengthen factual, temporal, ownership, security, performance or release claims.

Do not apply Persian prose rules to unrelated code.
